package.name: usb_cam_rt
package.description: Low-latency USB camera node for ROS Noetic. Forces 800x600 YUYV capture via V4L2, disables all auto-adjustments, uses CLOCK_MONOTONIC_RAW timestamps, SCHED_FIFO RT capture thread pinned to an isolated CPU core, and zero-copy mmap buffer pipeline. Tested on EPL USBGS1200P01 global shutter camera on Orange Pi 5 Max.
